# Generated OpenCode V2 catalogs

Each language/subject directory is an independently hostable HTTP catalog. Configure
OpenCode with `{"skills":{"urls":["https://host/catalog/base/"]}}`.

Each skill directory contains a literal `SKILL.md` plus its generated resources.
Do not edit this directory by hand.

| Pack | Catalog path | Version |
|---|---|---|
| `python-best-practices` | `python/best-practices/index.json` | `1.0.0` |
| `python-cli-apps` | `python/cli-apps/index.json` | `1.0.0` |
| `rust-best-practices` | `rust/best-practices/index.json` | `1.0.0` |
| `rust-cli-apps` | `rust/cli-apps/index.json` | `1.0.0` |
| `genaptic-skillsets-development` | `shared/genaptic-skillsets-development/index.json` | `1.0.0` |
| `postgres-databases` | `shared/postgres-databases/index.json` | `1.0.0` |
